description: Action plan generated from mock inspection findings. Overall rating: Requires Improvement
title: CQC Mock Inspection Action Plan - 18/02/2026

actions.notes: Improve processes to prevent medication errors and ensure all staff are retrained in safe administration practices.
Establish a more robust response mechanism for safeguarding alerts, ensuring timely and thorough investigations.
Enhance communication and accountability structures in management to address incidents and inform improvements.
Develop a detailed learning framework that incorporates analysis of incidents and feedback loops into practice.
Ensure that all care plans are updated in a timely manner reflective of the most recent assessments.
Streamline the process for addressing and resolving client complaints to improve response times.

actions.action: Regulation 12: Safe care and treatment: Medication administration errors noted, posing risks to service users
actions.notes: Ensure immediate compliance

actions.action: Regulation 13: Safeguarding service users from abuse and improper treatment: High number of safeguarding alerts raised without timely evidence of action taken
actions.notes: Ensure immediate compliance

description: Action plan generated from mock inspection findings. Overall rating: Good
title: CQC Mock Inspection Action Plan - 18/02/2026

actions.notes: Strengthen leadership oversight by implementing regular management meetings to review safeguarding incidents and risk assessments.
Develop and communicate a comprehensive incident management policy that includes follow-up actions after a critical incident.
Enhance the documentation quality in care planning to ensure all risk assessments reflect current needs accurately and are easily accessible to staff.
Improve responsiveness to complaints by establishing a clear timeframe for responses and better communication with clients and their families.
Consider integrating electronic systems for risk assessments to enhance accuracy and efficiency of updates.
Encourage more staff feedback during quarterly supervisions to promote a culture of learning and improvement.

actions.action: Regulation 13 - Safeguarding Service Users from Abuse and Improper Treatment: Two critical safeguarding alerts raised, demonstrating the need for immediate corrective action and oversight.
actions.notes: Ensure immediate compliance

actions.action: Regulation 17 - Good Governance: Inconsistent management oversight related to incident reporting and responsive action plans.
actions.notes: Ensure immediate compliance
